title: AI Sovereign FinOps Operator: Economic-Aware and Sovereignty-Constrained Routing for Enterprise LLM Gateways
description: Kubernetes operator and reproducible experimental framework for economic-aware, sovereignty-constrained, budget-aware routing of enterprise LLM traffic. Includes 7 CRDs and pure FinOps/sovereignty/break-even engines, a multi-provider experiment harness (OpenAI + Mistral EU via Azure AI Foundry), public-benchmark evaluation (GSM8K, MMLU) with objective exact-match, a 30-repetition statistical study (CIs, significance, effect sizes), an LLM-judge validity analysis, and a Q1-oriented paper. All results, cached responses and analysis scripts are released for reproducibility.
